name: create_hubspot_lead_capture_machine
title: HubSpot Lead Capture Machine
author: Generated by Botcraft
short_description: Capture and retrieve leads from HubSpot CRM with flexible filtering and data enrichment options.
long_description: This machine connects to HubSpot CRM to capture and retrieve lead information. It supports fetching new inbound leads based on creation date, retrieving specific leads by ID, and enriching lead data with contact properties and engagement history. The machine handles pagination for large datasets and provides structured JSON output for downstream processing.

specification.input:
• hubspot_api_key: String - HubSpot API key for authentication
  • action: String - Operation to perform (fetch_new_leads or get_lead_by_id)
  • fetch_new_leads_since_days: Number - Days to look back for new leads
  • include_contact_properties: Array - List of contact properties to include
  • max_leads_per_fetch: Number - Maximum number of leads to retrieve
  • lead_status_filter: String - Filter leads by status
  • include_engagement_data: Boolean - Include engagement history
specification.output:
• status: Success or error status
  • leads: Array of lead objects with contact information
  • total_count: Total number of leads retrieved
  • has_more: Boolean indicating if more leads are available
  • error_message: Error details if operation fails

parameters.detail: Your HubSpot API key for authentication. Required for all operations.
Select the HubSpot operation to perform
Number of days to look back when fetching new leads (e.g., 7 for last week)
JSON array of contact property names to include (e.g., ["email", "firstname", "lastname"])
Maximum number of leads to retrieve in a single fetch (0 for no limit)
Include engagement history and activity data for each lead

faq.question: How do I get a HubSpot API key?
faq.answer: Log into your HubSpot account, go to Settings > Integrations > API Key, and generate or copy your private app key.

faq.question: What contact properties can I include?
faq.answer: You can include any standard or custom HubSpot contact properties like email, firstname, lastname, company, phone, etc. Provide them as a JSON array.

faq.question: How does the new leads filter work?
faq.answer: The machine fetches leads created within the specified number of days from the current date. For example, setting 7 days will retrieve all leads created in the last week.

faq.question: What happens if I hit the API rate limit?
faq.answer: The machine implements automatic retry logic with exponential backoff to handle rate limiting gracefully.
